summary: Supports portfolio brands with campaign-ready creative for web, social, editorial support, and motion content.
bullets: Delivered creative for brands including Patio Productions, Starfire Design/Direct, Harmonia Living, and Artificial Turf Supply.
Produced AI-assisted product and lifestyle imagery plus advanced Photoshop retouching and compositing.
Drafted and refreshed SEO blog content using AI tools with originality checks and brand-quality review.
Created 16:9, 9:16, product-video, GIF, and short-loop assets using HeyGen, Canva, and CapCut.
